Chloride is low at 92, which supports a concurrent chloride-responsive metabolic alkalosis rather than a single-process acidosis. Lactate is only 1.4, so it does not fully account for the raised anion gap on its own. 5. The overall pattern is a mixed high anion gap metabolic acidosis and metabolic alkalosis.
